data.content:
[Claude 2026-04-25] # Implementation Review — APPROVED

The artifact tagged on this knot (commit:29311507, branch:worktree-foolery-f354-ship-action) shipped the feature via a wildcard '* -> shipped' transition fabricated in TS (workflows.ts canonicalTransitions + knots-backend-workflows.ts withWildcardTerminals). That approach violated the project's kno-authoritative invariant ('Foolery TS must never override, extend, or post-process kno transitions') and was reverted on origin/main by knot 102e in commit 2b132a4c. The live shipped feature on origin/main now uses kno-idiomatic markTerminal correction paths added by 40fc31d3 + 01f210a2.

Acceptance criteria verification against the current main (markTerminal path):
1. PASS — Per-row state control: src/components/beat-detail-state-dropdown.tsx WorkflowStateDropdown surfaces a Correction submenu enumerating workflow.terminalStates (including Shipped); src/components/beat-table-mutations.tsx useUpdateBeatMutation routes terminal targets through markTerminalOrThrow.
2. PASS — Beat detail: same WorkflowStateDropdown component wired in beat detail with the same Correction submenu.
3. PASS — Multi-select bar: src/app/beats/use-bulk-actions.ts dispatchBulkUpdate routes terminal targets through markTerminalOrThrow.
4. PASS — Already-terminal handling: partitionEligibleForTerminalTarget partitions terminal selections; toast.info('Skipped N already-terminal beats') is emitted; no silent failure.
5. PASS — Test coverage: valid-next-states.test.ts (17/17 pass), use-bulk-actions-ship-guard.test.ts + beat-columns-valid-next-states.test.ts (26/26 pass), plus dedicated mark-terminal coverage (knots-backend-mark-terminal.test.ts, backends-mark-terminal-parity.test.ts, mark-terminal-route.test.ts).

Net assessment: feature is live on main, all acceptance criteria are met by the better (kno-authoritative) implementation. The wildcard artifact tags are stale, but that bookkeeping is outside this review's scope. Approving the implementation_review gate.
